# Pedro's Tacos & Tequila Bar

> A multi-sensational Mexican kitchen and tequila bar in Alexandria, Louisiana. Modern Mexican cooking, fresh-squeezed margaritas, and service where everyone remembers your name.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Pedro's Tacos & Tequila Bar
- **Address:** 3024 N MacArthur Dr., Alexandria, LA 71303
- **Phone:** (318) 427-7755
- **Website:** https://pedrostacosalexandria.com
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/pedrostacosalexandria

## Hours

- Monday – Thursday: 10:30am – 10:00pm
- Friday – Saturday: 10:30am – 11:00pm
- Sunday: 10:30am – 10:00pm

## Pages

- [Home](https://pedrostacosalexandria.com/) — Welcome, hero, featured dishes, and quick info
- [Menu](https://pedrostacosalexandria.com/menu) — Full food and drink menu
- [About](https://pedrostacosalexandria.com/about) — Story, atmosphere, and team
- [Visit](https://pedrostacosalexandria.com/visit) — Location, hours, directions, and virtual tour
